title: Word Formation: Social Media and Internet

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: LIFE ONLINE
tasks.text: Social media has changed the way we share 1.1. ________ with each other. Platforms like Instagram and TikTok have gained enormous 1.2. ________ among young people. These apps offer hours of 1.3. ________, but users should be 1.4. ________ about what they share online. Protecting your 1.5. ________ is very important because strangers can see your posts. Some teenagers develop an 1.6. ________ to their phones and spend too many hours scrolling. It is also easy to lose real 1.7. ________ if you only talk to people through screens. To stay safe, you should follow basic internet 1.8. ________ rules and never share personal details with people you do not know.
